originalSQL: SELECT name, dur FROM app_launch WHERE dur > 1000000
fixedSQL: SELECT name, dur FROM slice WHERE dur > 1000000

originalSQL: SELECT * FROM app_launch ORDER BY ts DESC
fixedSQL: SELECT * FROM slice ORDER BY ts DESC

originalSQL: SELECT ts FROM slice WHERE name LIKE '%MainActivity%'
fixedSQL: SELECT ts / 1e9 AS timestamp_s FROM slice WHERE name LIKE '%MainActivity%'
